name: argmax
description: Local desktop command center for Claude Code and Codex sessions.

scripts.dev: npm run rebuild:electron && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on dist/main/main.js tcp:5173 && electron ."
scripts.rebuild:electron: npm_config_runtime=electron npm_config_target=35.7.5 npm_config_disturl=https://electronjs.org/headers npm rebuild better-sqlite3 node-pty && node scripts/ensure-node-pty-helper.cjs
scripts.rebuild:node: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 node-pty && node scripts/ensure-node-pty-helper.cjs
